title: To designate the U.S. National Poultry Research Center of the Department of Agriculture located in Athens, Georgia, as the "Abit Massey Poultry Research Center".
plain_summary: This bill changes the name of a government research center in Athens, Georgia. The center is currently called the U.S. National Poultry Research Center and belongs to the Department of Agriculture. The new name will be the Abit Massey Poultry Research Center. All official government papers will use this new name from now on.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Livestock, Dairy, and Poultry.

sections.title: Section 1  Abit Massey Poultry Research Center
sections.text: The government research center that studies chickens and other poultry will get a new name. This center belongs to the Department of Agriculture and is located in Athens, Georgia. Right now it is called the U.S. National Poultry Research Center. The new name will be the Abit Massey Poultry Research Center. From now on, whenever any government law, map, rule, document, or other official paper mentions the old name, it will mean the new name instead.
